message:
feat(python): numpy.linalg.eigh wrapper parity (franken_numpy-mj9r)

Add fnp_python.eigh(a, UPLO='L') as a passthrough delegator to
np.linalg.eigh preserving the EighResult namedtuple
(eigenvalues, eigenvectors), the UPLO selector, complex-Hermitian
real-eigenvalue guarantee, and batched (..., M, M) broadcasting
semantics.

Covered by one pyo3 oracle test with five scenarios: real
symmetric 2x2 default UPLO='L', symmetric 3x3 explicit UPLO='U',
4x4 identity (eigenvalues all 1, eigenvectors form I), batched
2-stack of 2x2 symmetric, and complex Hermitian 2x2. Test
compares eigenvalues via numpy.allclose directly and eigenvectors
via abs() then allclose (since LAPACK column-sign is non-
deterministic), accessing both .eigenvalues and .eigenvectors
attributes to confirm the returned object is a true
EighResult namedtuple.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
